title: Contracts let by board
doc_html:
§3087.352.  Contracts let by board

Any and all contracts of the district shall be let by the board of commissioners under the provisions of R.S. 38:2181 et seq.

Acts 2005, No. 214, §1, eff. June 29, 2005.
